name: Chicken French
recipeIngredient: 1 teaspoon Le Gout Chicken Base (or 1 chicken bullion)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the chicken into tenders (about a 1/2 wide strip) and pound them out with a meat mallet or side of a cleaver.
2. Pour the oil into a frying pan and add 1-2 tablespoons butter to a large fryer, melting together.
3. Heat to medium-high heat. The egg should bubble on contact.
4. Dip the chicken in flour, covering both sides. Using a fork, dredge the meat through the egg wash, covering both sides.
5. Place the chicken into the frying pan and fry until golden brown on both sides.
6. When brown, remove from the pan onto a plate. Try not to get your hands wet as the flour becomes messy.
7. Sauce: In a pan, add 1-1 1/2 cups of sherry (or white wine). Add the remaining butter and juice from two lemons strained. Use two lemon slices as garnish and the rest gets juiced through a strainer.
8. Add chicken stock to this mixture (1 teaspoon Le Gout Chicken Stock base and 1/2 cup water) to make it richer.
9. Arrange the chicken in a baking dish and pour over the sauce. Place lemon slices on top of the chicken as garnish, cover with foil, and place in an oven preheated to 225-250°F for 15-30 minutes (to keep warm).
